title: CRM community sessions: email & activities
excerpt:
In this community session, @sashawe presents one of the biggest CRM features, email & activities and discusses ways it can impact your monday CRM workflow. 
Our CRM community sessions are all about you and your questions…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
In this community session, @sashawe presents one of the biggest CRM features, email & activities and discusses ways it can impact your monday CRM workflow.

Our CRM community sessions are all about you and your questions! Share your ideas and register for an upcoming session here.
